summary: Iteration 148 - Payment Unlock Bug Fix Testing Complete. All fixes verified: (1) FEATURE_TYPE_ALIASES includes 'grounds_unlock' mapping to 'grounds_of_merit', (2) Admin bypass for grounds endpoint works - admin can view any case's grounds with is_unlocked=true, (3) Grounds endpoint uses canonical_feature_type for unlock check, (4) PaymentModal has Search icon import and renders without errors, (5) GroundsOfMerit component shows dedup protection badge and export buttons when unlocked.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment unlock bug fix verified. Admin bypass for grounds endpoint works correctly - admin can view any case's grounds with is_unlocked=true. FEATURE_TYPE_ALIASES includes 'grounds_unlock' mapping to 'grounds_of_merit'. PaymentModal and GroundsOfMerit components render correctly with all expected data-testid attributes.
